name: Macaroni and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni according to package instructions, then drain and place in a casserole dish.
2. In a separate bowl, heat together the soups, milk, and mayonnaise until just mixed.
3. Sprinkle in some pepper.
4. Add 3/4 of the shredded white cheddar cheese to the soup mixture.
5. Mix with the cooked macaroni.
6. Add the remaining shredded white cheddar cheese on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes, uncovered.
